allow: Bash(mkdir -p src/model src/evaluators src/crossProcess src/llm/prompts src/io test/fixtures spec/canonical/processes spec/sources)
Bash(grep -n "^4\\.[0-9]*\\.[0-9]*\\. SYS\\.2\\|^Process purpose$\\|^Process outcomes$\\|^Base Practices$\\|^Output Information Items$" Automotive-SPICE-PAM-v40.md)
Bash(node src/cli.js evaluate -p SYS.2 -l 1 -e rule test/fixtures/sys2_srs.md test/fixtures/sys2_trace_matrix.csv)

Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"processId":"SYS.2","artifact":{"name":"test.md","text":"# Requirements\\nREQ-SYS-001: bidirectional traceability shall be established between requirements.\\nConsistency review is captured."},"targetLevel":1,"engine":"rule"}')

Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:5173/api/project -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"processIds":["SYS.1","SYS.2","SYS.3","SWE.1"],"artifacts":[{"name":"stk.md","text":"Stakeholder requirements. STK-001: response time 100ms. STK-002: temp range -40 to 85."},{"name":"srs.md","text":"System Requirements Specification. REQ-SYS-001: traces from STK-001. REQ-SYS-002: traces from STK-002. Bidirectional traceability is maintained."},{"name":"arch.md","text":"System architecture. ARCH-SYS-001 realises REQ-SYS-001. ARCH-SYS-002 realises REQ-SYS-002."},{"name":"sw_srs.md","text":"Software requirements. REQ-SW-001: derived from REQ-SYS-001 via ARCH-SYS-001."}],"targetLevel":1,"engine":"rule"}')
